recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: Get a Horse!
recommendations.overview: Mickey, Minnie, Horace Horsecollar, and Clarabelle Cow go on a musical wagon ride until Peg-Leg Pete tries to run them off the road.

recommendations.title: Up
recommendations.overview: Carl Fredricksen spent his entire life dreaming of exploring the globe and experiencing life to its fullest. But at age 78, life seems to have passed him by, until a twist of fate (and a persistent 8-year old Wilderness Explorer named Russell) gives

recommendations.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Comedy, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: A young boy and his dog, who happens to have a genius-level IQ, spring into action when their time-machine is stolen and moments in history begin to be changed.

recommendations.title: Tarzan II
recommendations.overview: When one of his missteps puts his family in jeopardy, Tarzan decides they would be better off without him.

recommendations.title: The Secret of Kells
recommendations.overview: Adventure awaits 12 year old Brendan who must fight Vikings and a serpent god to find a crystal and complete the legendary Book of Kells. In order to finish Brother Aiden's book, Brendan must overcome his deepest fears on a secret quest that will tak

recommendations.title: Asterix: The Mansions of the Gods
recommendations.overview: In order to wipe out the Gaulish village by any means necessary, Caesar plans to absorb the villagers into Roman culture by having an estate built next to the village to start a new Roman colony.

recommendations.title: Balto: Wolf Quest
recommendations.overview: Balto and his daughter Aleu embark on a journey of adventure and self discovery.
